scripts.build: node scripts/node/generate-internal-index-stubs.js && node scripts/node/extract-baseline.js && node scripts/node/normalize-shops.js && node scripts/node/render-learn-static-fallback.mjs && node scripts/node/inject-theme-preinit.js && node scripts/node/inject-schema.js && node build/generateSitemap.js && vite build
scripts.test:e2e: npx playwright install --with-deps && npm run test:playwright
scripts.quality: npm run lint && npm run format:check && npm run style
scripts.perf:ci: npm run image-audit && npx playwright test --reporter=list || true
scripts.linkcheck:report: mkdir -p reports && npm run linkcheck --silent > reports/links-current.json || true
scripts.linkcheck:baseline: mkdir -p reports && npm run linkcheck --silent > reports/links-initial.json || true
scripts.linkcheck:dist: mkdir -p reports && node scripts/node/stage-dist-statics.js && (linkinator dist --recurse --skip "^https?://(?!localhost|127\.0\.0\.1)" --skip "/assets/.*\.html$" --format json > reports/links-dist.json || true)
scripts.preflight: npm run audit-pages && npm run check-links
scripts.qa:regression: npm run build && npm run validate && npm run test && npm run lint
scripts.validate: node scripts/node/generate-internal-index-stubs.js && node scripts/node/validate-build.js && node scripts/node/inject-theme-preinit.js --check && node scripts/node/check-agent-governance.js && node scripts/node/check-unsafe-dom.js && node scripts/node/check-shell-guard.js && node scripts/node/check-basic-a11y.js && node scripts/node/check-seo-meta.js && node scripts/node/apply-section-og.js --check && node scripts/node/reference-language-sweep.js --check && node scripts/node/check-sw-coverage.js && node scripts/node/check-sw-precache.js --fail-on-error && node scripts/node/audit-content-pages.js --fail-on-error && node scripts/node/enrich-placeholder-pages.js --check && node scripts/node/externalize-analytics.js --check && node scripts/node/inventory-seo.js --check && node scripts/node/seo-governance.js --check && node scripts/node/check-country-url-policy.js --fail-on-error && node scripts/node/export-analytics-inventory.js --check && node scripts/node/inject-schema.js --check && node scripts/node/sync-icon-sprite.js --check
